top_next_targets: Fix large TCP transfer packet accounting so ACK-side packet counts scale plausibly with high-byte SMB/proxy/TLS transfers instead of staying at single digits.
Fix Kerberos same-socket ordering so visible 4768 AS/TGT records precede matching 4769 TGS records, or model cached-TGT usage by omitting visible 4768 rows.
Make DNS resolver TXT/DMARC answers cache-aware so the same resolver/name/type remains stable inside TTL windows.
Ensure Windows processes with in-window Security/eCAR create evidence and Sysmon file/terminate evidence also render source-consistent Sysmon Event 1 unless a collection policy explains omission.
Reduce Linux command-pool repetition, smoothed bash-history timing, and desktop-oriented diagnostics on server-named hosts.
